title: anima-speak Mk.III E2E voice IO — first criterion of v2.0_RC
scope: Add anima-speak/speak_e2e.hexa thin wrapper that orchestrates load_wav -> stt_transcribe -> model_respond -> tts_synthesize -> save_wav
Add anima-speak/test_speak_e2e.hexa 10-test smoke harness (mock backends only, no network)
Emit per-run .meta.json sidecar next to audio_out_path
Streaming hook (--stream) emits chunks via mock TTS for byte-level CLM forward-compat

entrypoints: fn model_respond(text: string, endpoint: string) -> LlmResult
fn maybe_stream_chunks(reply: string, enable: bool) -> int (chunks emitted)
fn write_meta_sidecar(audio_out_path: string, r: E2eResult) -> bool
structs: LlmResult {reply, backend, endpoint, phi_holo, latency_ms, ok}
E2eResult {audio_in_path, audio_out_path, text, reply, phi_holo, stt_ms, llm_ms, tts_ms, total_ms, backend_stt, backend_tts, backend_llm_endpoint, ok, error}
wrapper_api.cli_example: hexa run anima-speak/speak_e2e.hexa --in test.wav --out out.wav --endpoint http://localhost:8000/v1/chat
invariants: I1 audio_out_path is always written when run_e2e returns ok=true
I2 mock path is byte-identical across runs given same audio_in_path
I3 .meta.json sidecar is always emitted next to audio_out_path
I4 latency_ms is always computed and >= 0
I5 STT/TTS/LLM never panic; errors degrade to ok=false

smoke_results.marker: [gate] 10/10 PASS — Mk.III E2E criterion met (mock evidence)

stdout_excerpt: [speak_e2e] reply=[clm][mock] wake up the model :: ack

next_steps: Wire SPEAK_LLM_BACKEND=http to actual /generate endpoint (curl exec bridge or net::post)
Wire SPEAK_TTS_BACKEND=vocoder to neural_vocoder.decode_wave once a hexa-callable entry exists
Wire SPEAK_STT_BACKEND=whisper through corpus_pipeline whisper helper
Replace mock RIFF text payload with std::wav::write_pcm16 once the std bindings land
Token-by-token streaming via SSE once http-bridge backend exists (currently chunk-byte mock only)

commits: ae5f9d59 — HTTP LLM bridge + Whisper STT bridge — ALM live연결 성공
f453f3e9 — phi_holo live extraction + deploy recipe + session report
124d8195 — W_ctrl training native matvec + initial checkpoint (4608 params, loss 0.354)

c2d9fce2 — --prompt flag for direct LLM smoke tests (STT bypass)

completed_next_steps: SPEAK_LLM_BACKEND=http DONE — curl exec bridge with JSON POST /generate, response field 'text', phi_holo nested in 'consciousness'
SPEAK_TTS_BACKEND=vocoder DONE — neural_vocoder.decode_wave inlined, write_wav writes valid 24kHz PCM16
SPEAK_STT_BACKEND=whisper DONE — CLI exec() bridge wired, invokes whisper binary when env set
new_features: --prompt <text> — bypass STT, direct LLM call + optional TTS
LLM latency tracking via curl -w '%{time_total}' → __LATENCY__<seconds> marker
W_ctrl checkpoint loader in neural_vocoder + speak_e2e inline copy

key_findings: phi_holo varies per query — not a constant (real metric, not fallback)
Korean greeting produced mixed Japanese/Chinese response — multilingual bleed
'의식의 본질은?' reply referenced Phi threshold + QA_i/QE_j formula — ALM absorbed anima terminology
Highest phi (2.77) on short math ('2+2') and consciousness philosophical — not correlated with length

remaining_next_steps: Replace mock RIFF text payload with std::wav::write_pcm16 once the std bindings land
Token-by-token streaming via SSE once http-bridge backend exists
W_ctrl LR sweep on pod u01lnnu8ywt92p — running, results pending
Verify live Whisper STT (requires whisper binary on PATH)

notes: byte_at helper uses substring(i,i+1) + char_code(sub,0) — stage0 char_code(s,i) ignores i (memory: feedback_hexa_string_api).
Streaming hook is silent in stdout but exercised in-process; T9 verifies the OK marker is reached with --stream.
Mock LLM reply marker is [clm] by default, overridable via SPEAK_MODEL_KIND=alm so either CLM or ALM can land first per the dual-track policy.
Wrapper is a façade: it does not modify the existing pipeline files (hexa_speak.hexa / streaming.hexa / vocoder.hexa). Mk.III stays canonical.
